tagline: The Perfect Escape from the Everyday

hero.headline:
Your Serene Escape Awaits in
Green Lake
hero.subheadline: Tucked away on wooded acreage in beautiful Green Lake, Wisconsin, Elan Brio Spa is the country retreat you have been craving. Unwind with signature treatments, soak in our saltwater pool, and leave feeling completely renewed.

services.label: Our Treatments
services.headline: Spa Experiences Crafted<br class="hidden md:block"> for Total Renewal
services.subtitle: From skilled massage therapy to rejuvenating facials, every treatment at Elan Brio is designed to restore your body and quiet your mind. Complimentary amenities included with every visit.

cards.title: Massage Therapy
cards.description: Signature Elan Brio, Classic Swedish, and Deep Muscle massage performed by skilled therapists. Couples suites available for shared relaxation.

cards.title: Facial Treatments
cards.description: Customized facials using premium skincare products tailored to your skin. Deep rejuvenation that leaves you glowing and refreshed.

cards.title: Body Treatments
cards.description: Detoxifying scrubs and nourishing wraps that revitalize your skin from head to toe. Total body wellness in a tranquil setting.

cards.title: Hair & Salon Services
cards.description: Full hair services including cuts, color, styling, and bridal treatments. Look your best for any occasion with our expert stylists.

cards.title: Nail Care
cards.description: Signature manicures and pedicures in a relaxing spa environment. Premium products and meticulous attention to every detail.

cards.title: Waxing & Lash Services
cards.description: Professional full-body waxing along with expert lash and brow treatments. Leave feeling polished and refreshed from every angle.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Perfect Spa Day

steps.title: Choose Your Experience
steps.description: Browse our focused menu of premium treatments and select what speaks to you. Book online or call us to reserve your preferred date and time.

steps.title: Arrive & Unwind
steps.description: Check in at our wooded retreat and enjoy complimentary access to the Saltwater Soaking Pool, Steam Room, Hot Pool, and Relaxation Lounges before your treatment.

steps.title: Leave Completely Renewed
steps.description: After your treatment, linger in our Spa Cafe with scenic views, sip something warm by the fireplace, and carry that calm feeling home with you.

about.label: Why Guests Choose Us
about.headline: A Country Spa Recognized Among America's Finest
about.description: Nestled on wooded acreage in Green Lake, Wisconsin, Elan Brio Spa is a nationally recognized retreat just 90 minutes from Madison, Green Bay, and Milwaukee. Named a Spas of America Top 100 Spa and Top 10 Best Country Spa of 2025, we deliver premium treatments in a serene, adult-oriented setting where every detail is designed for genuine relaxation.

features.title: Complimentary Wellness Amenities
features.description: Every guest enjoys access to our Rainfall Saltwater Soaking Pool, herbal Steam Room, Hot Pool, Relaxation Lounges, and Spa Cafe at no extra charge.

features.title: Trained, Skilled Therapists
features.description: Our therapists are handpicked for their expertise and warmth. Every treatment combines professional skill with genuine care for your comfort.

features.title: Tranquil Adult-Oriented Setting
features.description: Designed for refined relaxation with fireplace lounges, scenic views, and wooded surroundings. An escape crafted for adults seeking true serenity.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Exceptional Value.
pricing.subtitle: Every treatment includes complimentary access to all spa amenities. No hidden fees, no surprise charges.

guarantee.headline: Our Guest Satisfaction Promise
guarantee.description: Your complete relaxation is our priority. If any part of your spa experience does not meet your expectations, let us know and we will make it right. From the moment you arrive to the moment you leave, every detail should feel effortless and restorative.

faqs.question: What is included with my spa treatment?
faqs.answer: Every treatment includes complimentary access to our Rainfall Saltwater Soaking Pool, herbal Steam Room, Hot Pool, Relaxation Lounges, and Spa Cafe. We recommend arriving early to enjoy the full experience.

faqs.question: How far is Elan Brio Spa from major cities?
faqs.answer: We are conveniently located about 90 minutes from Madison, Green Bay, and Milwaukee, and approximately 3 hours from Chicago. Our Green Lake setting makes for a perfect day trip or weekend getaway.

faqs.question: Is Elan Brio Spa suitable for couples?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We offer couples massage suites where you and your partner can enjoy treatments side by side. Many couples combine treatments with our complimentary amenities for a full day of relaxation together.

faqs.question: Is this an adults-only facility?
faqs.answer: Yes, Elan Brio Spa is an adult-oriented facility designed to maintain a tranquil, serene atmosphere for all guests. This ensures every visitor can fully unwind without distraction.

faqs.question: How do I book an appointment?
faqs.answer: You can book online through our website or call us at 920-294-3347. We recommend booking in advance, especially for weekends and couples treatments, as appointments fill quickly.

testimonials.name: Jo Ellen
testimonials.text: Five girlfriends and I indulged in deep tissue massages from the talented trio I like to call 'The A Team.' The skilled therapists and serene lounge with scenic views made it an unforgettable experience.

testimonials.name: Joanne R.
testimonials.text: Beautiful facility, great service, massages were wonderful, very esthetic, and comfortable lounges, whirlpools, and steam room. An absolutely wonderful spa experience from start to finish.

testimonials.name: Spa Guest
testimonials.text: We have never had such an amazing experience! The staff were incredible, everyone was so friendly and made our visit so wonderful. One of the best spa experiences I have ever had anywhere.

contact.subtitle: Book your spa day at Elan Brio and experience why we are named a Top 100 Spa in America. Complimentary amenities included with every treatment.
benefits: Convenient booking online or by phone
